channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Fortnite Teases Italian Brainrot Characters in New Video
item.content:encoded:
A new video has arrived teasing several new Fortnite characters, and eagle-eyed viewers have spotted two popular Italian brain-rot characters.

Fortnite is a title that is known for its collaborations; they recently announced a new crossover with Team Meat’s upcoming title, Super Meat Boy 3D. However, the developer is known for collaborating with all types of franchises, and the latest one might please Brainrot fans.

Fortnite Teases the Arrival of Tun Tun Sahur

A brand new video on the official Fortnite X account (formerly Twitter) takes players through a day in the life of the spawn island manager. In the process of taking players through those tasks, we see several old and new characters appear. One of the most prevalent characters in the video was Bugs Bunny. However, the more observant players have also spotted Tun Tun Sahur and Ballerina Cappucina from the Italian brainrot characters that seem to be coming to Fortnite.

At the moment, no details have been shared about what this collaboration will entail or when it will arrive in Fortnite, but one thing seems certain: Italian Brainrot skins are coming to Fortnite. Players will have to see if they bring some other elements to the Island as well, such as changes to the POI, new abilities, boss characters, and more. However, this is speculation; players should wait for an official announcement to know for sure.

In other news, Fortnite is finally going to be playable through the Google Play Store again. Additionally, Fortnite’s PvE Save the World mode will become free-to-play for all players in April 2026. What are your thoughts on Fortnite teasing Italian Brainrot characters? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about NetEase revealing the roadmap details for Season 7 of Marvel Rivals. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: Marvel Rivals Season 7 Roadmap Revealed
item.content:encoded:
The full roadmap for Marvel Rivals Season 7 has been revealed by NetEase, and it looks like another jam-packed season is on the horizon.

White Fox and Black Cat were unveiled as the two new Heroes coming to Marvel Rivals in Season 7, and judging by the roadmap, White Fox is joining the game first. However, it doesn’t stop there, as plenty of content is planned across the next month for the popular superhero shooter.

Marvel Rivals Season 7 Roadmap

Season 7 is set to kick off on March 20, and that’s when the bulk of new content will arrive.

The headliner is undoubtedly the new Strategist, White Fox, who’s bound to shake up the meta in a host of interesting ways. Whilst her abilities sound useful, it’s her ult that has people talking. Once it’s charged, she turns herself into her full nine-tailed form, where she can use claw strikes to attack enemies whilst healing allies.

New hero aside, another battlepass will be available, featuring 10 new skins for a variety of characters. It doesn’t stop there, though, with a new event—the Dual Life of Peter Parker—and a basketball challenge in Times Square on the way.

A week later, starting on March 27, expect another event, this time titled Flight Mode! World Tour Merch Vol. 2, as well as some new costumes for Cloak and Dagger, and Captain America. A few days later, get ready for April Fool’s Day, with a brand new duo emote for Deadpool and Jeff.

Halfway through Season 7, expect a new map to enter the Marvel Rivals line-up: Lower Manhattan. Not much has been seen of the map yet, but to celebrate the occasion, a set of new costumes will arrive for Marvel’s favourite couple, Mister Fantastic and Invisible Woman.

It’ll slow down by the middle of April, with all eyes on Season 7.5, which starts on April 17. By then, you’ll finally be able to sink your claws into Black Cat, the second hero of Season 7!

Are you excited for Season 7 of Marvel Rivals? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more news, check out the cast announcements for Netflix’s live-action Assassin’s Creed series, as well as the bizarre update to PlayStation 3 consoles.

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Series Announces New Cast Members
item.content:encoded:
New cast members from Mission: Impossible, Ford vs Ferrari, and more are joining the Assassin’s Creed live-action series.

The Assassin’s Creed live-action series for Netflix was announced back in July 2025, and since then, they have brought on an Euphoria star as the lead and will feature Chernobyl’s director at the helm. Now, a slew of more cast members have been announced as recurring roles in the series.

Assassin’s Creed Series Casts Mission: Impossible, Ford vs Ferrari, and More Stars

A new announcement from Ubisoft reveals the latest additions to the Assassin’s Creed live-action series cast. New members include Noomi Rapace (Lamb, Prometheus), Sean Harris (Mission: Impossible, The Stranger), Ramzy Bedia (Of Money and Blood, Haunted Minds, The Party’s Over), and Corrado Invernizzi (Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny, Ford v Ferrari, Doctor Who). The new members will be recurring roles in the upcoming series.

For those unaware, the live-action series is the first of many to come out of the Ubisoft-Netflix deal. The series has been described as a genre-bending live-action epic that “is centered on the secret war between two shadowy factions – one set on determining mankind’s future through control and manipulation, while the other fights to preserve free will.” The rest are going to be animated and anime adaptations.

In other news, Assassin’s Creed Unity recently received a 60 FPS patch on Xbox Series consoles and PlayStation 5. Additionally, Ubisoft has confirmed that Assassin’s Creed Jade is currently in development. What are your thoughts on the new cast members for the Assassin’s Creed live-action series? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Nvidia CEO saying gamers are completely wrong about DLSS 5. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

item.title: N4RRATE Returns to Karmine Corp After Sentinels Stint
item.content:encoded:
Karmine Corp has announced the long-expected return of Marshall ‘N4RRATE’ Massey to its Valorant roster following a largely unsuccessful 17-month stay at Sentinels.

The American Initiator at times seemed to struggle with the pressure of the Sentinels roster, which remains one of Valorant’s most-supported teams, but returns to the place where he played his most confident game with Karmine Corp in EMEA.

Difficult Kickoff for Sentinels and Karmine Corp sees N4RRATE move

N4RRATE leaves Sentinels after their disappointing 9th-10th place finish at VCT 2026: Americas Kickoff, which saw Sentinels play messy and unstructured Valorant for much of the split.

As a result, Sentinels missed another international, failing to qualify for Valorant Masters Santiago, a bitter pill to swallow for one of Valorant’s most-celebrated organisations.

N4RRATE himself was at times used as an experimental piece for the roster, flexing as a Duelist as Sentinels struggled to find balance in their lineup.

The news follows the transfer of Jonah ‘JonahP’ Pulice from G2 to Sentinels, taking the Initiator role and overlapping in Agent Pool with N4RRATE despite their varying styles of play.

Veteran in-game leader, Bogdan ‘Sheydos’ Naumov, is moved to the bench following the announcement, leaving the Russian without a spot only two months into his time at KC.

The news followed a dismal showing from Karmine Corp at EMEA Kickoff 2026, which also saw the roster finish 9th-10th. Their only win came in the lower-bracket 0-2 matchup against FUT, losing to NAVI, Liquid, and Team Heretics to bomb out of the competition.

No formal announcement of the new Karmine Corp in-game leader has been made, however, Hazem ‘avez’ Khaled is expected to be the primary caller in a system with more shared responsibility over a hard IGL-based calling style.

Can Karmine Corp make their unusual calling style work for EMEA Split 1? Discuss that, and more, on the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Valorant roster news, see the recent news of Shao’s benching at NAVI.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson
